title: Easy Invisible Item Frame
description: adds a keybind to turn normal item frames invisible
body:
adds a keybind (normal y/z) in the gameplay tab to turn a normal item frame into a invisible item frame

when key presed it detects if the player has item frames in the inv if yes it executes the command to /give the player a invisible item frame im not sure but eventually the keybind only works if the player is admin
